headline: Assessing NextEra Energy (NEE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Return Signals
summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) has been drawing attention after recent share price weakness, with the stock down 14% over the past month and 10% over the past 3 months. This has prompted fresh questions about its valuation. See our latest analysis for NextEra Energy. At a share price of US$83.66, NextEra Energy’s short term momentum has weakened, with the 30 day share price return down 13.71% and the 7 day move also negative. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 21.82% and 5 year total...

headline: As Trump Predicts Gas Prices Will 'Drop Like A Rock,' Moody's Chief Economist Estimates $100 Billion Iran War Cost To Americans
summary: Moody's warns Trump's Iran War costs US households $750, delivering a massive economic blow as surging gas prices erase recent tax refunds.
